title: Basic JavaScript Recursion and Backtracking
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Recursion and Backtracking. Focus on implementing Recursion patterns correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Recursion and Backtracking
description: Create a function that uses Recursion patterns and Recursive backtracking together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Recursion and Backtracking Project
description: Build a small application that applies Recursion patterns, Recursive backtracking, N-Queens problem in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Recursion and Backtracking
description: The following code has bugs related to Recursion patterns. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Recursion and Backtracking
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Recursion patterns and Recursive backtracking.
